title: Discover
subtitle: Map the landscape
description: I investigate complex workflows and user needs to align UX strategy with C-level business objectives and regulatory requirements. By leveraging generative AI tools for ideation alongside rigorous field research, we uncover hidden operational constraints before any architecture begins.

title: Design
subtitle: Architect with precision
description: Translating complex data into intuitive, scalable design frameworks using advanced node-based AI tools and high-fidelity prototyping. Every component is engineered for accessibility, ensuring strict compliance across rigorous HIPAA, ADA, and WCAG enterprise standards.

title: Deploy
subtitle: Ship to production
description: Seamlessly bridging the gap between design and engineering through meticulous developer handoffs in fast-paced agile environments. We partner with cross-functional technical teams to deliver accessible, production-ready assets that drive immediate operational efficiencies.

title: Evolve and Iterate
subtitle: Compound returns
description: Driving long-term platform adoption and workflow efficiency through quantified impact analysis and continuous A/B testing. We utilize behavioral insights to refine experiences, scale design capabilities, and secure measurable business results over time.
